name: Taco Bell's Cinnamon Twists (Angel Wings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl, adding each item as listed and enough more flour so that the dough is no longer sticky, but still very soft.
2. Roll small portions of dough at a time to paper-thin sheets using a lightly floured working surface.
3. Cut into strips 2" x 5".
4. Heat oil in a deep heavy saucepan to 400°F (204°C), at least 3" deep.
5. Drop the dough into the hot oil, making a 1" slit down the center of each strip and drawing the opposite ends through the slit.
6. Allow them to brown for about 2 minutes until they surface, then lift out with tongs and drop into a large bowl containing about 1 pound (454 grams) of powdered sugar.
